meaning: n.污点,缺点,瑕疵vt.弄脏,玷污,损害
examples: This is the one blemish on an otherwise resounding success.
Every piece is closely scrutinized, and if there is the slightest blemish on it, it is rejected.
His reputation is without a blemish.
The other, smaller shareholders could lose out no matter what, a significant blemish on this story.
However, as Internet companies have found, there is one blemish: profits may be some way off.
